title: Rubens Better Survival
description: Overhauls Minecraft to a better Game! This Modpack overhauls the Visuals, improves Gameplay and adds new Structures and bosses!
body: This Modpack overhauls Minecraft while still staying ture to the Vanilla Game! It adds new challenging Structures, new Mobs and new Bosses! It also features a custom nether and end Dimension! This Modpack basicly overhauls everything!
